title: ericoila altaica
side_effects: Ericoila altaica can have side effects if used improperly, such as diarrhea, nausea, and stomach pain due to its high levels of glycosides. In severe cases, overconsumption of the plant can lead to vomiting, headaches, and dizziness. Additionally, improper use of Ericoila altaica can interact with medications, such as blood thinners, and exacerbate conditions like diabetes and high blood pressure. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using the plant for medicinal purposes.
